title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: tests/test_turn_builder.py (第 260 至 290 行，共 290 行) ---
 260 | 
 261 |     engine = CompressionEngine()
 262 |     messages = [
 263 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "bulk\n" * 200},
 264 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "Traceback: RuntimeError in core/compression_engine.py"},
 265 |         {
 266 |             "role": "assistant",
 267 |             "content": "",
 268 |             "tool_calls": [tool_call("call_recent", "execute_bash")],
 269 |         },
 270 |         {
 271 |             "role": "tool",
 272 |             "tool_call_id": "call_recent",
 273 |             "name": "execute_bash",
 274 |             "content": "pytest tests/test_turn_builder.py passed",
 275 |         },
 276 |         {"role": "assistant", "content": "recent final"},
 277 |     ]
 278 | 
 279 |     result = await engine.compress(
 280 |         messages=messages,
 281 |         strategy=CompressionStrategy.LLM_SUMMARY,
 282 |         llm_summarizer_func=summarizer,
 283 |         min_keep=2,
 284 |     )
 285 | 
 286 |     assert result.success
 287 |     assert "Traceback: RuntimeError" in captured["prompt"]
 288 |     assert "bulk" not in captured["prompt"]
 289 |     assert result.compressed_messages == messages[2:]
 290 |     assert_valid_openai_tool_pairs(result.compressed_messages)
--- 读取完毕 ---
